subject: Supplier invoice
snippet: Hey love, the invoice from Bayside Marine Supply came in this morning -- $2,340.1...
body: Hey love, the invoice from Bayside Marine Supply came in this morning -- $2,340.18 for the new cleats and the two bilge pumps. It's due on the 10th. Want me to pay it out of the business checking now, or hold off until the weekend charter deposits clear?

subject: Re: Supplier invoice
snippet: Go ahead and pay it now, the Saturday and Sunday deposits both cleared this morn...
body: Go ahead and pay it now, the Saturday and Sunday deposits both cleared this morning so we're fine. Let's not repeat the late fee mess we had with the fuel dock back in March. Thanks for staying on top of this stuff, I owe you one.

subject: Staffing schedule
snippet: Jack, quick one -- the Hendersons booked the 6-person sunset charter for this Sat...
body: Jack, quick one -- the Hendersons booked the 6-person sunset charter for this Saturday and asked if we can add a deckhand since they're bringing three kids. Who do you have free? Danny or Miguel?

subject: Re: Staffing schedule
snippet: Danny's free Saturday, Miguel's got the morning fishing trip out of Solomons. I'...
body: Danny's free Saturday, Miguel's got the morning fishing trip out of Solomons. I'll text Danny now and confirm he can do the 4pm sunset run. Let the Hendersons know we've got it covered.

subject: Re: Staffing schedule
snippet: Perfect, just confirmed with Danny myself and he's in. I'll let the Hendersons k...
body: Perfect, just confirmed with Danny myself and he's in. I'll let the Hendersons know everything's set for 4pm Saturday. Thanks for turning that around fast.

subject: Quarterly tax estimate
snippet: Jack, our accountant emailed -- Q3 estimated tax payment is due September 15th. B...
body: Jack, our accountant emailed -- Q3 estimated tax payment is due September 15th. Based on the charter income so far this year she's suggesting we set aside around $8,200. Want me to go ahead and schedule the transfer into the tax savings account?

subject: Re: Quarterly tax estimate
snippet: Yeah, go ahead and move it over. Better to have it sitting there ready than scra...
body: Yeah, go ahead and move it over. Better to have it sitting there ready than scrambling in September like we did last year. Did she say if the estimate accounts for the new boat depreciation?

subject: Re: Quarterly tax estimate
snippet: She said yes, the depreciation on the new boat is already factored in, that's ac...
body: She said yes, the depreciation on the new boat is already factored in, that's actually why the number came in a bit lower than she first thought. I'll set up the transfer for Friday when the payroll clears.

subject: Re: Quarterly tax estimate
snippet: Sounds good, Friday works. Thanks for handling this, taxes are the one thing abo...
body: Sounds good, Friday works. Thanks for handling this, taxes are the one thing about running this business I still dread every quarter.

subject: Customer review reply
snippet: Jack, we got a review posted on the charter site last night -- 3 stars, said the ...
body: Jack, we got a review posted on the charter site last night -- 3 stars, said the trip was fun but felt rushed and the fishing gear was 'kind of old.' Want me to respond or do you want to handle it since it's about the equipment?

subject: Re: Customer review reply
snippet: I'll take this one since it's about gear. Can you send me the exact wording of t...
body: I'll take this one since it's about gear. Can you send me the exact wording of the review first? I want to make sure I address the rushed feeling too, that's the part that worries me more.

subject: Re: Customer review reply
snippet: Copying it here: 'Nice views and captain was friendly, but felt rushed near the ...
body: Copying it here: 'Nice views and captain was friendly, but felt rushed near the end and some of the rods/reels looked pretty worn. Would go again but hope they update equipment.' That's the whole thing.

subject: Re: Customer review reply
snippet: Okay, drafted a reply thanking them, explaining the tide timing on that run, and...
body: Okay, drafted a reply thanking them, explaining the tide timing on that run, and mentioning we just ordered new rod sets for next season. Can you post it from the business account and also flag it to Danny about pacing the last hour?

subject: Re: Customer review reply
snippet: Posted it, reads well. Already mentioned the pacing thing to Danny this morning,...
body: Posted it, reads well. Already mentioned the pacing thing to Danny this morning, he said he'll build in more buffer time on sunset runs going forward. Good catch on the review.

subject: Lunch this week?
snippet: Hey Jack, you around for lunch this week? Been meaning to catch up since the sea...
body: Hey Jack, you around for lunch this week? Been meaning to catch up since the season's picking up for you. I'm free Wednesday or Thursday, your call.

subject: Re: Lunch this week?
snippet: Wednesday works better, I've got a charter Thursday afternoon. Let's do that cra...
body: Wednesday works better, I've got a charter Thursday afternoon. Let's do that crab shack by the marina around noon, I'll buy since you drove out last time.

subject: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Jack, been a minute since we actually sat down and talked instead of just textin...
body: Jack, been a minute since we actually sat down and talked instead of just texting. You free for coffee next Tuesday morning? That new place on Main has decent espresso apparently.

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Tuesday works, mornings are usually slow before the afternoon charter. What time...
body: Tuesday works, mornings are usually slow before the afternoon charter. What time were you thinking? I can do anywhere between 8 and 10.

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Let's say 9, gives me time to drop the dog at daycare first. See you there, been...
body: Let's say 9, gives me time to drop the dog at daycare first. See you there, been looking forward to this.

subject: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: So Sarah's birthday is coming up and a few of us are thinking brunch on Saturday...
body: So Sarah's birthday is coming up and a few of us are thinking brunch on Saturday to celebrate. You and Bridget in? Thinking that place downtown with the bottomless mimosas.

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: We're in, just need to check what time works around the kids' swim lessons. What...
body: We're in, just need to check what time works around the kids' swim lessons. What time were you all thinking, and should we bring anything?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: 11am should work, swim lessons usually wrap by 10:30 right? No need to bring any...
body: 11am should work, swim lessons usually wrap by 10:30 right? No need to bring anything, we're splitting the bill evenly. I'll grab her a gift from the group, you can just Venmo me whatever.

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: 11 works perfectly, thanks for organizing this. I'll Venmo you today so I don't ...
body: 11 works perfectly, thanks for organizing this. I'll Venmo you today so I don't forget. Bridget says she's excited, been too long since we all got together.

subject: Renewal options
snippet: Jack, the Sea Tow membership renewal notice came in -- they've got three tiers no...
body: Jack, the Sea Tow membership renewal notice came in -- they've got three tiers now, and the gold one's gone up almost $80 from last year. Want me to just renew the same plan or look at what's changed?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Let's actually look at it this time, we added the second boat since last renewal...
body: Let's actually look at it this time, we added the second boat since last renewal so we might need the tier that covers multiple vessels. Can you send me the breakdown of what each tier covers?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Sent it to your email. Basically gold covers unlimited towing for one boat, plat...
body: Sent it to your email. Basically gold covers unlimited towing for one boat, platinum covers up to two boats and adds soft ungrounding, which given how many times you've run aground near the flats seems worth it.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Yeah, platinum makes sense given the flats situation, ha. Go ahead and renew at ...
body: Yeah, platinum makes sense given the flats situation, ha. Go ahead and renew at that tier, worth the extra cost for peace of mind with two boats out there now.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Done, renewed at platinum, confirmation just came through. Coverage starts the d...
body: Done, renewed at platinum, confirmation just came through. Coverage starts the day after our current plan expires so there's no gap.

subject: Vendor invoice question
snippet: Quick question -- got an invoice from Chesapeake Fuel Dock for $612 but I don't s...
body: Quick question -- got an invoice from Chesapeake Fuel Dock for $612 but I don't see a matching delivery date in our records. Did we get an extra fuel delivery last week that I missed logging?

subject: Re: Vendor invoice question
snippet: Yeah, that was the Thursday top-off before the weekend charters, I forgot to sen...
body: Yeah, that was the Thursday top-off before the weekend charters, I forgot to send you the receipt. Go ahead and pay it, I'll be better about logging those going forward.

subject: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: Landlord sent the renewal terms for the apartment -- same rent if we sign a 12-mo...
body: Landlord sent the renewal terms for the apartment -- same rent if we sign a 12-month, or a 5% bump for month-to-month. Given how much we're using it just for storage and the occasional overnight before early charters, what do you think?

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: Let's lock in the 12-month at the same rate, it's still cheaper than driving bac...
body: Let's lock in the 12-month at the same rate, it's still cheaper than driving back and forth on the 4am charter days, and we're not using it enough to justify month-to-month flexibility anyway.

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: Agreed, I'll sign the 12-month renewal today and send it back to the landlord. T...
body: Agreed, I'll sign the 12-month renewal today and send it back to the landlord. That locks us in through next July then.

subject: Newsletter -- this week's reads
snippet: Sending you this week's newsletter roundup -- there's a good piece on small chart...
body: Sending you this week's newsletter roundup -- there's a good piece on small charter businesses handling the fuel price swings, thought it was relevant to us. Also one about a marina expansion down in Solomons.

subject: Re: Newsletter -- this week's reads
snippet: Read the fuel price one, actually gave me an idea about locking in a seasonal ra...
body: Read the fuel price one, actually gave me an idea about locking in a seasonal rate with our supplier like they mentioned. Might bring it up with Bayside next time we talk. What did the Solomons piece say?

subject: Re: Newsletter -- this week's reads
snippet: Basically they're adding forty new slips and a fuel dock, expected done by next ...
body: Basically they're adding forty new slips and a fuel dock, expected done by next spring. Could mean more competition down there but also more boat traffic overall, might be worth watching.

subject: Re: Newsletter -- this week's reads
snippet: Good to know, I'll keep an eye on it. Thanks for flagging these, I never seem to...
body: Good to know, I'll keep an eye on it. Thanks for flagging these, I never seem to find time to read this stuff myself during the season.

subject: Schedule check -- kids pickup
snippet: Jack, I've got a doctor's appointment Thursday at 3 that's going to run into pic...
body: Jack, I've got a doctor's appointment Thursday at 3 that's going to run into pickup time. Can you grab the kids from school, or do we need to ask my mom?

subject: Re: Schedule check -- kids pickup
snippet: I've got a charter that afternoon but it should be done by 2:30, so I can make p...
body: I've got a charter that afternoon but it should be done by 2:30, so I can make pickup at 3:15 no problem. What time's your appointment supposed to wrap up?

subject: Re: Schedule check -- kids pickup
snippet: Should be done by 4:30 at the latest. If your charter runs long though, let me k...
body: Should be done by 4:30 at the latest. If your charter runs long though, let me know early enough that I can still call my mom as backup.

subject: Re: Schedule check -- kids pickup
snippet: Will do, I'll text you right when we're heading back to the dock so you know eit...
body: Will do, I'll text you right when we're heading back to the dock so you know either way. Worst case my mom's only ten minutes from the school anyway.

subject: Re: Schedule check -- kids pickup
snippet: Sounds good, thanks for sorting this out. I'll let the school know you might be ...
body: Sounds good, thanks for sorting this out. I'll let the school know you might be the one picking up just in case they need it on file.

subject: Family vacation planning
snippet: Been looking at flights for the Outer Banks trip in August, prices are creeping ...
body: Been looking at flights for the Outer Banks trip in August, prices are creeping up. Should I just book now for the week after Labor Day since charters usually slow down then?

subject: Re: Family vacation planning
snippet: Yeah, book it for that week, bookings do drop off right after Labor Day so I can...
body: Yeah, book it for that week, bookings do drop off right after Labor Day so I can actually take the time off without losing much business. Let me know the dates once it's confirmed so I can block it on the charter calendar.

subject: Weekend plans
snippet: What's the weekend looking like for you? I know Saturday you've got the morning ...
body: What's the weekend looking like for you? I know Saturday you've got the morning charter, but are you free Sunday, or is that booked too?

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: Sunday's actually open, no charters on the books yet. Want to take the kids out ...
body: Sunday's actually open, no charters on the books yet. Want to take the kids out on the small boat ourselves for once, or just have a lazy day at home?

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: Let's take the kids out, they've been asking to go on the boat without it being ...
body: Let's take the kids out, they've been asking to go on the boat without it being 'daddy's work.' I'll pack a lunch, we can do a little cove somewhere quiet.
